module.name: statement
module.description: A big, centered key statement for a message slide — large type, optional accent, optional small attribution below. Body = the message (Markdown / math).
module.aiSpec:
A large centered KEY STATEMENT for a "message" slide — the one big idea. The body is the statement (Markdown, so \( \) math and **bold** work). Use it for a punchy takeaway, a thesis, or a big number + phrase.
Parameters: `size` — font size in rem, ~1 to ~6 (default 2.6). `align` — center | left (default center). `color` — text colour (default theme text colour). `weight` — light | normal | semibold | bold | heavy (default heavy = 800). `by` — small attribution shown beneath the statement (default none). `quote` — true | false (default false): wrap the statement in decorative quotation marks. `maxwidth` — max width in rem to keep lines readable (default 0 = full width).
Example: <!-- @statement size: 3, weight: bold, quote: true, by: Leonardo da Vinci --> Simplicity is the ultimate **sophistication**. <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Statement text colour; blank = theme text.

param.name: quote
param.label: Quotation marks
param.desc: Wrap the statement in decorative quotes.

snippet.label: Big statement
snippet.text: <!-- @statement size: 3, by: Leonardo da Vinci --> Simplicity is the ultimate **sophistication**. <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Large centered key message with optional attribution.
